data.name: bsiHints.Caption
data.value: Hints: Ctrl+Click or Shift+Click to add/remove selection. Shift+Wheel to zoom.

data.name: bsiHintsTextSelected.Caption
data.value: Text selected: double-click or F2 to edit. While typing: Ctrl+Plus/Minus or Ctrl+Wheel for font size. Enter to finish, Esc to cancel.

data.name: bsiHintsShapeInside.Caption
data.value: Inside label: use the toolbar text field next to "Text inside…" and the font/color menus.
